**Clinical Reasoning:** Tocilizumab is specifically characterized as a humanized monoclonal antibody that targets and inhibits the interleukin-6 receptor (IL-6R), thereby acting as an IL-6 antagonist. This mechanism is supported by explicit statements in the evidence describing it as “anti-interleukin-6 receptor alpha” and functioning as an “IL-6 antagonist.” While efficacy in certain conditions like severe COVID-19 is debated, the molecular mechanism of action remains clear and consistent.
